plugins.name: obspy
plugins.desc: Seismology data processing with ObsPy. Read waveforms, fetch FDSN data, filter signals, remove instrument response, search earthquakes. Use when working with seismic waveforms or earthquake data.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: segyio
plugins.desc: Read, write, and manipulate SEG-Y seismic data files. Fast trace/header/inline/crossline access. Use when working with SEG-Y format seismic data.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: disba
plugins.desc: Compute surface wave dispersion curves for layered Earth models. Rayleigh/Love wave phase and group velocities, sensitivity kernels. Use for surface wave analysis or tomography.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: lasio
plugins.desc: Read, write, and manipulate LAS well log files. Parse headers, extract curves, handle problematic files. Use when working with LAS format well data.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: welly
plugins.desc: Well data analysis toolkit. Load wells from LAS, process curves, manage formation tops, multi-well projects. Use for well log analysis workflows.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: dlisio
plugins.desc: Read and parse DLIS/LIS well log files. Extract curves, metadata, handle multi-frame files. Use when working with DLIS/RP66 format well logs.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: striplog
plugins.desc: Create, visualize, and analyze lithological and stratigraphic logs. Well correlation, net-to-gross ratios. Use for lithology columns and stratigraphic visualization.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: petropy
plugins.desc: Petrophysical analysis and formation evaluation. Calculate porosity, water saturation, permeability from well logs. Use for petrophysical interpretation.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: gempy
plugins.desc: 3D structural geological modeling using implicit methods. Faults, folds, unconformities from surface points and orientations. Use for 3D geological model construction.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: loopstructural
plugins.desc: 3D geological modelling with implicit surfaces, faults, and folds. Use for structural geological modelling from field data.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: gemgis
plugins.desc: Spatial data processing for GemPy geological modelling. Extract interfaces from maps, sample DEMs, convert GIS formats. Use for preparing geospatial data for 3D modelling.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: simpeg
plugins.desc: Geophysical forward modelling and inversion framework. DC resistivity, magnetics, gravity, EM methods. Use for geophysical data inversion.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: devito
plugins.desc: Symbolic PDE solver with automatic code generation. Seismic wave propagation, FWI, RTM. Use for finite-difference wave simulation.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: pylops
plugins.desc: Linear operators for inverse problems. Deconvolution, imaging, signal processing. Use for matrix-free inverse problems at scale.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: pygimli
plugins.desc: Multi-method geophysical inversion framework. ERT, seismic refraction, IP. Use for near-surface geophysical data inversion.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: harmonica
plugins.desc: Gravity and magnetic data processing and forward modelling. Terrain corrections, equivalent sources, derivative filters. Use for potential field analysis.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: bruges
plugins.desc: Geophysical equations and rock physics. AVO, Gassmann fluid substitution, wavelets, elastic moduli. Use for rock physics calculations and seismic modeling.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: verde
plugins.desc: Spatial data gridding and interpolation with ML-style API. Spline, linear, block reduction, cross-validation. Use for gridding scattered spatial data.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: geostatspy
plugins.desc: GSLIB-inspired geostatistics. Variograms, kriging, sequential Gaussian simulation. Use for geostatistical analysis and spatial estimation.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: scikit-gstat
plugins.desc: Geostatistics with scikit-learn API. Variogram fitting, ordinary kriging, directional analysis. Use for geostatistical interpolation with modern API.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: pastas
plugins.desc: Groundwater time series analysis and modelling. Transfer function models for well response to recharge/pumping. Use for hydrogeological time series analysis.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: landlab
plugins.desc: Landscape evolution and surface process modelling. Erosion, flow routing, hillslope diffusion. Use for geomorphological modelling.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: mplstereonet
plugins.desc: Stereonet plots for structural geology. Great circles, poles, density contours, fold axis analysis. Use for structural orientation data visualization.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: pyrolite
plugins.desc: Geochemistry data analysis and visualization. REE spider diagrams, TAS classification, compositional transforms. Use for geochemical data analysis.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: gprpy
plugins.desc: Ground-penetrating radar data processing. Dewow, gain, filters, velocity analysis, depth conversion. Use for GPR profile processing.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: mtpy
plugins.desc: Magnetotelluric data processing and modelling. EDI files, impedance tensors, phase tensors, pseudosections. Use for MT data analysis.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: xarray
plugins.desc: N-dimensional labeled arrays for geoscience. NetCDF, climate/ocean data, temporal aggregation, Dask integration. Use for multi-dimensional scientific data.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: pyvista
plugins.desc: 3D visualization and mesh analysis. Geological models, seismic volumes, point clouds, surfaces. Use for 3D geoscience visualization.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: pooch
plugins.desc: Data file fetching and caching. Download with checksum verification, archive extraction, data registries. Use for reproducible data downloads.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: gnnwr
plugins.desc: Geographically Neural Network Weighted Regression. Spatially varying coefficient regression, GTNNWR for spatiotemporal data, KNN mode for large datasets. Use for spatial non-stationarity analysis and coefficient mapping.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.desc: End-to-end seismic interpretation workflow from SEG-Y loading through signal processing, rock physics, and visualization.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.desc: Complete well log evaluation workflow from LAS/DLIS loading through QC, petrophysical analysis, lithology, and visualization.

plugins.desc: 3D geological modelling workflow from spatial data preparation through implicit surface modelling and 3D visualization.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.name: geophysical-inversion
plugins.desc: Geophysical data inversion workflow from data loading through mesh creation, inversion, and result visualization.
plugins.author: SteadfastAsArt

plugins.desc: Rock physics and AVO analysis workflow from well log preparation through elastic properties, fluid substitution, and synthetics.

plugins.name: usd-reserve-loss-gold-revaluation
plugins.desc: 在「美元／某貨幣失去儲備地位、黃金成為唯一錨」的假設下，用央行貨幣負債 ÷ 黃金儲備，推演「資產負債表可承受的隱含金價」，並輸出各國/各貨幣的槓桿程度、缺口與排名
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: compute-precious-miner-gross-margin
plugins.desc: 以公開金屬價格 + 礦業成本指標（AISC/All-in cost/現金成本）計算「黃金/白銀礦業毛利率代理值」，並判斷當前是否處於歷史高/低檔區間。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: wasde-ingestor
plugins.desc: 抓取並解析 USDA（美國農業部）每月發布的 WASDE（世界農產品供需估計）報告，擷取所有主要商品（穀物、油籽、棉花、畜產品、糖）的供需平衡表。產出經標準化、具版本控管的資料集，作為即時預測的基準錨點。
plugins.author: macro-skills

plugins.name: track-equity-cumulative-return
plugins.desc: 追蹤股票/指數的累積報酬率，支援多標的比較、指數成分股 Top N 排名，並與 S&P 500 作為基準進行比較，並輸出視覺化圖表。
plugins.author: macro-skills

plugins.name: us-cpi-pce-comparator
plugins.desc: 自動比較 CPI（固定權重）與 PCE（動態權重）的通膨訊號，識別低波動高權重桶位的 PCE 上行風險。用於分析 Fed 關注的 PCE 是否正在 re-accelerate，即使 CPI 看似降溫。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: nickel-concentration-risk-analyzer
plugins.desc: 以全球鎳供給結構為核心，量化各國的主導程度（例如印尼）、主要礦區供給量、以及政策配額/減產情境對全球供需平衡與價格非對稱的影響。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: track-agri-hedge-fund-positioning
plugins.desc: 用 COT 非商業部位變化，量化對沖基金在農產品期貨的資金流向，並把出口需求、USDA 數據、美元/原油/金屬等宏觀風向整合成可交易的敘事與訊號。
plugins.author: macro-skills

plugins.name: monitor-etf-holdings-drawdown-risk
plugins.desc: 偵測「商品價格上漲、但對應實物 ETF/信託持倉卻下滑」的背離現象，並用多指標交叉驗證，評估是否存在實物供給緊張/交割壓力風險
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: lithium-supply-demand-gap-radar
plugins.desc: 將鋰產業鏈（礦端 → 精煉化學品 → 電池與終端需求），整合為一套可運算的替代指標；再把這些指標映射到鋰主題 ETF（如 LIT）的成分暴露與長期價格走勢，形成可供決策的依據。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: list-china-today-macro-news
plugins.desc: 彙整今日中國宏觀經濟新聞消息，從華爾街日報、36氪等來源抓取並篩選宏觀相關新聞，輸出雜誌風格的新聞摘要。適用於交易/研究開盤前快速掌握中國宏觀動態。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: google-trends-ath-detector
plugins.desc: 模擬真人操作瀏覽器抓取 Google Trends 數據，自動判定搜尋趨勢是否創下歷史新高（ATH）或出現異常飆升，並提供訊號分類。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: forecast-sector-relative-return-from-yield-spread
plugins.desc: 用美債殖利率曲線利差（如 2Y-10Y）建立領先關係，推估未來一段時間內成長股（Nasdaq 100）相對防禦股（Healthcare/XLV）的相對績效方向與幅度。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: detect-us-equity-valuation-percentile-extreme
plugins.desc: 把多個股票估值指標統一轉成在過去百年歷史中的分位數，再合成一個總分，判斷目前是否處於歷史極端高估區間，並用歷史類比（如 1929、1965、1999）給出風險解讀
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: detect-shanghai-silver-stock-drain
plugins.desc: 以公開交易所庫存資料為核心，量化上海白銀庫存耗盡的方向、速度與加速度，並將其轉成可交易的供給緊縮訊號
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: evaluate-exponential-trend-deviation-regimes
plugins.desc: 計算資產價格相對長期指數成長趨勢線的偏離度，衡量當前是否處於歷史極端區間，並可選擇性地進行宏觀因子分析以判斷行情體質。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: detect-freight-led-inflation-turn
plugins.desc: 透過美國卡斯貨運指數 (CASS Freight Index) 的週期轉折，偵測美國通膨壓力是否進入放緩或反轉階段。用於判斷「通膨是否正在降溫」，並驗證市場對降息、通膨回落的宏觀敘事是否有實體經濟數據支撐。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: detect-palladium-lead-silver-turns
plugins.desc: 以鈀金的先行轉向作為確認條件，檢驗白銀短期漲跌是否獲得工業景氣與風險情緒的同步支持，並標記缺乏鈀金參與度的失敗走勢。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: detect-fed-unamortized-discount-pattern
plugins.desc: 檢查聯準會持有證券的未攤銷折價（Unamortized Discounts）是否出現與特定歷史危機期間相似的走勢模板，並用多指標交叉驗證是否真的屬於「金融壓力升高」而非單純會計/利率效果
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: detect-atr-squeeze-regime
plugins.desc: 以 14 日指數平滑 ATR 偵測市場是否從秩序型趨勢轉為波動主導的擠壓（squeeze）行情，並輸出對技術位、停損、交易持有期的可行性評估。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: demographic-fiscal-trap-analyzer
plugins.desc: 分析人口老化、債務動態、官僚膨脹與通膨稀釋交互作用下的「財政陷阱」風險，量化各國/地區的財政脆弱度並識別潛在的貨幣稀釋路徑
plugins.author: macro-skills

plugins.name: cost-density-net-rr-calculator
plugins.desc: 計算非線性交易成本對風險報酬比的影響。將固定手續費與買賣價差整合為統一的成本密度（Cost Density）指標，揭示停損幅度與策略效率之間呈現雙曲線式的關係。
plugins.author: macro-skills

plugins.name: backsolve-miner-vs-metal-ratio-with-fundamentals
plugins.desc: 從網路自動抓取礦業公司財務報表與營運揭露（產量、成本、資本支出），回算「礦業股/金屬本體比率」的基本面解釋與區間門檻（如 1.2/1.7），並輸出可重現的估值拆解（成本因子 / 槓桿因子 / 倍數因子 / 稀釋因子）。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-us-bank-credit-deposit-decoupling
plugins.desc: 分析銀行貸款與存款之間的「信貸創造脫鉤」現象，用以辨識聯準會緊縮政策在銀行體系內部的真實傳導效果。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-rolex-market-index-liquidity-proxy
plugins.desc: 用勞力士市場指數（WatchCharts Rolex Market Index）作為高 β 的風險偏好／流動性代理，建立可重現的公開數據流程，判讀「流動性改善但未到投機狂熱」的狀態
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-silver-miner-metal-ratio
plugins.desc: 以「銀礦股價格 / 白銀價格」的相對比率衡量礦業股板塊相對於金屬本體的估值區間（偏貴/偏便宜），並用歷史分位數與類比區間推導「底部/頂部」訊號與情境推演。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-retail-inverse-etf-allocation
plugins.desc: 以槓桿反向 ETF（做空）相對槓桿正向 ETF（做多）的交易占比，作為散戶風險偏好（自滿 vs 避險）代理指標，評估 SPX 後續下行風險。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-platinum-to-brazil-equities-transmission
plugins.desc: 使用公開市場資料量化驗證鉑/白金對巴西股市（EWZ）的長週期傳導/連動關係，輸出雙軸圖、領先落後分析、關聯強度分數與監控訊號。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-move-risk-gauges-leadlag
plugins.desc: 用公開市場數據檢查「利率波動率（MOVE）是否對利率事件（如 JGB 殖利率變動）不恐慌，並且是否領先帶動 VIX / 信用利差走低」

plugins.name: analyze-jgb-insurer-superlong-flow
plugins.desc: 從日本保險公司對長端/超長端 JGB 的淨買入(淨賣出) 時間序列，自動產出「本月是否創紀錄賣超、連續賣超月數、期間累積賣超」等結論。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-japan-debt-service-tax-burden
plugins.desc: 以日本公債殖利率變化為觸發，量化「政府利息支出 / 稅收」負擔（含情境壓力測試），並判斷是否進入債務利息螺旋風險區。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-investment-clock-rotation
plugins.desc: 把「獲利成長 × 財務狀況（金融環境）」映射成「投資時鐘」，判斷目前落在哪個象限、近期是順時針還是逆時針旋轉、以及相對於上一輪循環的位置差異
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-high-unemployment-high-gdp-growth-fiscal-deficit-scenarios
plugins.desc: 在「失業率走高／勞動市場轉弱」但「名目或實質 GDP 仍維持高位（或仍在成長）」的情境下，依據歷史關聯估算美國財政赤字占 GDP（Deficit/GDP）可能擴張的區間，並生成對長天期美債（長久期 UST）供給/利率風險的情境解讀。

plugins.name: analyze-gas-fertilizer-contract-shock
plugins.desc: 用天然氣與化肥價格的日頻數據，檢驗「天然氣暴漲→化肥供應受限/毀約→化肥飆價」敘事是否成立，輸出可標註到圖上的關鍵轉折點與領先落後分析。

plugins.name: analyze-copper-supply-concentration-risk
plugins.desc: 用公開資料量化「銅供應是否過度集中、主要產地是否結構性衰退、替代增量是否依賴少數國家」，並輸出可行的中期供應風險結論與情境推演。
plugins.author: Ricky Wang

plugins.name: analyze-copper-stock-resilience-dependency
plugins.desc: 用跨資產訊號（全球股市韌性 + 中國利率環境）評估銅價能否突破關卡或進入「回補/回踩」到支撐的機率與路徑

plugins.name: analyze-copper-inventory-rebuild-signal
